'''âw-sh-sh-j''' ('''kawashejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hobandnob|hobandnob]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-sh-sh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hobandnob|hobandnob]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-sh-sh-j
|-
! Lemma
| kawashejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwashejoko|thiwashejoko]] || [[word:jiwashejoko|jiwashejoko]] || [[word:shiwashejoko|shiwashejoko]] || [[word:kiwashejoko|kiwashejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwashejoko|thuthuwashejoko]] || [[word:jujuwashejoko|jujuwashejoko]] || [[word:shushuwashejoko|shushuwashejoko]] || [[word:kukuwashejoko|kukuwashejoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowashejoko|thowashejoko]] || [[word:jowashejoko|jowashejoko]] || [[word:showashejoko|showashejoko]] || [[word:kowashejoko|kowashejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwashejoko|thĂŠwashejoko]] || [[word:jĂŠwashejoko|jĂŠwashejoko]] || [[word:shĂŠwashejoko|shĂŠwashejoko]] || [[word:kĂŠwashejoko|kĂŠwashejoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawashejoko|thawashejoko]] || [[word:jawashejoko|jawashejoko]] || [[word:shawashejoko|shawashejoko]] || [[word:kawashejoko|kawashejoko]]
